target: 5th Loop
33. You Are a Time Traveler
(This should be around here…)
Um, you're Nezu-san, right.
Hah? What... this should be our first time meeting.
(Ah, right... We haven't met yet this time around.)
No... u-um!! Do you know about the Shadows too...?
If you've got things you wanna ask, first you're gonna answer my questions.
The keywords for that cipher are the author "Ryunosuke Nagumo", and her real name-- "Hizuru Minakata".
In other words, if this phone rings, the person on the other end knows Hizuru's true identity... Where did you learn it?
Hizuru hasn't told anyone but me that she's the novelist "Ryunosuke Nagumo", and in fact, no one else knows.
(Will they believe me? That I came from the future...)
If you're a Shadow, it makes sense.
"Hizuru was copied without us knowing, and her true identity was exposed"... That's the scenario she's on guard for.
But you're human.
Ah…!
Nagumo-sensei!!
(What should I do, what should I start with... Ah!!)
--U-Um!! Nagumo-sensei, please give me your autograph!!
A-Ajiro with the character for net and substitute, Shinpei with the character for prudence and flat! Please write "To Shinpei Ajiro-kun" in this book!!
Um... what I mean is... I'm a fan...!!
I have all the books you've published!! T-This one... "Swampman" too, I have both the physical and digital versions...!!
(Alright...! I introduced myself just like she told me to!!)
(Even looking at the big picture, that came off pretty creepy...!! Now... wh-what's going to happen!?)
An autograph... in this situation? You are--
Not normal.
Byron once said... "Truth is stranger than fiction".
I am not a romanticist, but even after contemplating every possibility, this is the conclusion I arrive at...
Here, what you requested.
Um... thank you very much!! I-I'll make this book a family heirloom--
Shinpei Ajiro. If what I am about to state is a fallacy, please correct me...
This morning on the ferry, you didn't know me, right?
There is no way to know my true identity unless I introduce myself... And I have not introduced myself yet.
Today... is not your first time experiencing this July 22nd. You have repeated it many times, haven't you?
In other words, you are a time traveler.

Ah!?
What are you saying--
Yes...
Yes!?
Huh?
Yes!! I just... returned from the future.
Ushio...?
Thank goodness...!! Hizuru-san... came back to life!!
Ushio...
Don't move…!!
Wait, Nezu-san!! Please listen to me!!
What is the meaning of this!! This is Kofune's daughter who died yesterday, isn't it!! You really are working with the Shadows!!!
Stop, Nezu... Don't be hasty!
Hizuru!?
Shinpei Ajiro. Answer me. Did I die?
…Yes.
(I told her everything that had happened up until now--)
I see... The world you observe becomes reality... That's what the four-armed one said?
Yes... But why do I have that kind of power...
If your right eye originally belonged to Haine... That means that eye is made of a Shadow. Do you not remember when it was printed?
No... it just happened at some point... I think it was after I came back to the island, though...
Hmm... ...Everything has just connected in my mind.
The one who bestowed that eye upon Shinpei Ajiro... Was you, Ushio.
!? M... me!? What do you mean!?
...Bestowed? No, "will bestow", I suppose...
It truly is a chicken or the egg dilemma... A causal loop... in circulating time, a "beginning" does not exist...
Even Nietzsche would be dumbfounded...
Hey, hey, Shinpei...! What kind of teacher is Hizuru-san!?
...Ah! Right... I hadn't told you yet.
It's Nagumo-sensei. You know, the novelist...
...Eeeehhh!!!! Nagumo... you mean that Ryunosuke Nagumo!?
Yeah. I even got an autograph.
Since when!? Or rather, she was a woman... I didn't know!
I've got another surprising piece of info. Nagumo-sensei... was apparently a regular at Kofune.
E... Eeh~~~~!? Really!? Isn't that amazing!?
What is this... Am I an idiot for being cautious?
Ushio... You said you can show your memories to others. I would very much like to experience it.
! Are you... going to trust me this time?
Shinpei Ajiro. What do you consider to be the cause of our previous failure?
(The cause of the failure…)
For one, after defeating Mio... I think it was taking separate actions from you guys starting on the 23rd.
If possible, this time... I want us all to cooperate!!
Hmm... Yes, I am of the same opinion. I look forward to working with you.
Wh... hey, Hizuru!!
Hizuru-san…
Wh--
...!! ...Mm... guh... Wh-What is this...?
(What...? What is happening...?)
These images flowing into my brain... Are they Ushio's... memories...?
Nezu… Ushio is an ally…
It's because she was an ally until the very end that that "message"-- the audio addressed to me... And Shinpei Ajiro's right eye, are here now...
I believe in you, Ushio.
Teacher…
Being able to truly believe in lies is human nature... Money, religion, stories... That is why I am a novelist.
Mine isn't fiction!
Hmph. I know.
(...That's the first time I've seen Sensei smile...)
...Tch! So you guys are putting your lives on the line too, huh...
Sorry for doubting you...
Nezu-san, you too... Thank you!
The four-armed one's goal is to revive Haine... That child...
...It seems the Shadows are planning to kill a lot of people at the summer festival the day after tomorrow... and feed them to Haine.
I don't know what lies beyond that ritual, but the four-armed one definitely called it the "ending"...
That ridiculously huge flat surface is its main body... Hiruko-sama!
If the shadow at Shiori's feet is nothing more than a part of Hiruko-sama... Then that explains why she didn't die no matter how many times we killed her!
But Shiori's combat ability isn't high... She can just walk around as Shiori... The main body is weak and can't move from that cave.
I see…
(So it's something like this, then...)
(In Haine's state, Hiruko-sama's legs are weak and she can't move satisfactorily. Hiruko-sama's main body is also weakened and unable to move.)
(On the other hand... in Shiori's state, she can walk around. In that case, the shadow at her feet is nothing more than a separated part of the main body.)
(And at this current time, Shiori is attending the funeral...)
What's your plan?
Let's see... I'd like to dive underground right now and strike the main body...
But unless we have a solid plan to defeat that four-armed one guarding the main body, history will just repeat itself.
More than anything, I'm worried about Mio, and Sou and the others too... Where should we even start...
...I want us to. First catch Shiori at Koba Mart, just like last time...!!
But we can't kill it! What are we going to do once we catch it?
About that... I might be able to erase her.
Yes…
What?! Wh-What do you mean?
(...Nagumo-sensei... to think she noticed without me saying anything...)
(Damn it... my tears... This is no time to be crying!! Pull yourself together!)
I see…
But I doubt I was the one who gave my name...
Did you meet your brother?
